description_long: This is a vintage military-style kepi hat, featuring a flat, oval-shaped top adorned with intricate gold embroidery in a symmetrical knot pattern. The hat is primarily dark brown with a wide, textured gold band encircling the crown, complemented by additional gold cord trim. The front of the hat displays a decorative gold insignia attached to a circular rosette, adding a formal and authoritative touch. The short, stiff visor is black and slightly curved, with gold trim along the edge, providing both style and function. The fabric appears to be a sturdy, woven material, likely wool or felt, with visible signs of wear and age, especially along the base. This hat would be suitable for ceremonial or parade use, reflecting historical or official urban contexts.
description: A vintage military kepi hat with gold embroidery, a wide gold band, and a black visor, showing signs of age and formal decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front-side view showing the gold embroidered top, wide gold band, and partial visor.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the oval crown, gold cord trim, and the full curve of the black visor.
description_view_2: Direct front view displaying the gold insignia, rosette, and the symmetrical embroidery on the crown.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the gold band, cord trim, and the side profile of the visor.
